info.title: Professional Sitemap Solution
info.what_text: Sitemap is a key SEO element that is directly related to how well your content is discovered. This is a formatted XML file which describes your website, allowing Search Engine crawlers (like Google) to find out what pages are present and which have recently changed, and to crawl your site accordingly.
info.who_text: We've been successfully providing online sitemap generator service for our customers since the very beginning, continuously improving and expanding it. We created millions of sitemaps and are trusted by website owners from all over the world.
info.adv1_text: on your computer or your server.
info.adv2_pre: We will create the XML sitemap
info.adv2_text: and will keep it up-to-date. You only need to provide your website URL.
info.adv3_text: is a must - we make it possible with flexible configuration options.
info.adv4_text: files on our servers as well, and submit them directly to: Google, Bing, IndexNow.
info.adv5_text: on your website and resolve them with the help of our top-rated Support.
info.adv6_text: such as the Site history, Broken links, Internal and External links, Site Structure and more, we will also create and maintain Images, Video, News sitemaps and RSS feed for you.

api.ref.intro: PRO Sitemaps API enables programmatic access to manage your account, including triggering sitemap updates and receiving update notifications via webhooks.
api.ref.setup_suffix: section to configure your API Key.
api.ref.request_params: Send a POST request to the {API endpoint URL} and include the following parameters:
api.ref.response_params: API response is a JSON object, including the following details:
api.ref.raw_response: API response would be a raw sitemap content.
api.ref.zip_response: API response would be a ZIP package content, including all sitemap files created for a specified website.
api.ref.param.entry_id: Site history entry ID (retrieved via Site History List API request)
api.ref.param.from: List entries starting from this entry (number)
api.ref.param.sitemap_self_uri: URL to your sitemap script that handles sitemap requests. Used in Index sitemap to set URLs for individual sitemaps. Note: Requires either 'sitemap_self_uri' or 'sitemap_self_path'.
api.ref.param.sitemap_self_path: Alternative to sitemap_self_uri - specifies path on your domain for linking individual sitemaps in the index sitemap.
api.ref.param.sitemap_id: Filename for specialized sitemaps like image or video sitemaps. Only needed if not using default web sitemap.
api.ref.param.callback_url_desc: callback URL that will receive POST updates when sitemap is updated
api.setup.intro1: Every API request must contain the authentication token (API Key) for validation. You can define your Key below.
api.setup.note_plans: NOTE: Full API access is provided for upgraded site accounts only
api.setup.select_site: Select a website to see site-specific API details
api.setup.reset_text: if you would like to reset your API Key.
api.setup.reset_warning: Note that this action will also invalidate your current API Key and all further API requests must use the new key instead!
api.setup.endpoint_info1: - all PRO Sitemaps API requests must be sent using
api.setup.endpoint_info2: - all required parameters must be included in the request body with
api.setup.endpoint_info3: - request must be sent to the following endpoint URL:
api.setup.callback_desc: This should point to the URL
api.setup.callback_suffix: if you would like to receive notifications from our service
api.setup.no_key: You don't have an API key yet.
api.setup.upgrade_notice: Your current plan does not include API access. Please upgrade to use this feature.
